title: DMS Plugin Index
tagline: Independent DMS plugins. Shared standards. One public directory.
intro: `DMS Plugin Index` is the public landing page for my Dank Linux / DankMaterialShell plugin ecosystem.
This repository keeps the shared rules, plugin discovery links, demo references, and high-level compatibility notes.
Plugin source code does not live here. Each plugin is developed and released in its own repository.

highlights.title: One Repo Per Plugin
highlights.text: Every public plugin lives in its own source repository and release flow.

highlights.title: Shared Standards
highlights.text: This root repository stores the workflows, conventions, and publishing rules.

highlights.title: Video-First Showcase
highlights.text: Each plugin entry can point to a short demo video that shows the real workflow.

highlights.title: Public Plugin Directory
highlights.text: Repository links, compatibility notes, and summaries stay in one public place.

roadmap: add live plugin entries after repository migration
add real featured plugins with repository and video links
add thumbnails or covers for each public plugin
add compatibility notes across DMS versions
add release and changelog links for each plugin
